description: Sepolia USDC ↔ Falcon F-USDC bridge. Bridge In from Sepolia; Bridge Out returns F-USDC to Sepolia USDC via the lock contract relay.

steps: Open Swap → Bridge and create a Sepolia wallet with your passkey
Fund the Sepolia address with test ETH (gas) and Sepolia USDC
Bridge In: approve + lock USDC; relay mints F-USDC on Falcon
Bridge Out: return F-USDC on Falcon; relay releases Sepolia USDC to your Sepolia wallet
Send Out: move Sepolia ETH/USDC to any 0x address
deposit_flow.note: No MetaMask required. Sepolia keys are encrypted with your passkey and stored only on this device.

withdraw_flow.note: Lock contract must include withdraw(). Redeploy with deploy-falcon-lock.js if bridge-out fails on-chain.
